title: The angels
wikitext:
[]: The angels             Quote Post by NERV » Thu Jun 23, 2005 10:34 pm Who said that there the real bad guys? huh? what if they where a good type of being overall c'mon maybe theres something wrong with the earth thats y they need to destroy it?

[]: Re: The angels             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Jun 23, 2005 11:00 pm NERV wrote: Who said that there the real bad guys? huh? what if they where a good type of being overall c'mon maybe theres something wrong with the earth thats y they need to destroy it?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jun 23, 2005 11:19 pm I thought it had to do with more than just survival and involved a return to adam?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 23, 2005 11:34 pm "Only one lifeform can avoid destruction and seize the day."

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Jun 24, 2005 12:26 am yes Exactly! because earth wasn't supposed to recieve both Adam and Lillith. but since they did, both life forms are fighting for life on earth. And by returning to Adam, the Angel's will become the dominant being of the earth and the lillim will be destoryed in third impact.
